hooks.command: jq -r '.source' | { read -r src; if [ "$src" = "resume" ] || [ "$src" = "clear" ] || [ "$src" = "compact" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Resumed session — skipping startup reads.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"RESUMED SESSION — do not re-read startup files. Reply only: Session resumed."}}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"Evelynn fresh startup — reading protocol files.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"FRESH SESSION — Evelynn startup. First run: bash scripts/evelynn-memory-consolidate.sh (fold session shards older than 24h into evelynn.md; commit+push). Then read in order: agents/evelynn/CLAUDE.md, agents/evelynn/profile.md, agents/evelynn/memory/evelynn.md, agents/evelynn/memory/last-sessions/ (read all shards within the last 48 hours by mtime), agents/memory/duong.md, agents/memory/agent-network.md, agents/evelynn/learnings/index.md (if exists). Then run: bash agents/health/heartbeat.sh evelynn mac"}}'; fi; }
python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(2) if not d.get('tool_input',{}).get('run_in_background') else sys.exit(0)"

jq -r '.session_id' | { read -r sid; if [ ! -f "/tmp/claude-subagent-${sid}-closed" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: Subagent closed without running /end-subagent-session. Run the closing protocol manually."}'; fi; rm -f "/tmp/claude-subagent-${sid}-started" "/tmp/claude-subagent-${sid}-closed"; }
